_protocol: deepternary-qualification-protocol.md Step 3 (prospective-like blind controls) + Step-3 execution recipe
_selection_rule: NOT in exclusion set; deposited strictly after horizon; UniProt-classified E3 in matrix scope; PROTAC (bifunctional linker, not molecular glue); POI+E3 have separable apo/binary structures; span VHL+CRBN; prefer >=2 with NO target-E3-pair training prior. All facts sourced from RCSB (run 29245576499).

controls.title: Crystal Structure of ACBI4-mediated ternary complex of KRAS G12D C118S GDP with pVHL:ElonginC:ElonginB
controls.notes: ACBI4 PROTAC (published Boehringer degrader). KRAS-VHL pair post-horizon (earliest KRAS-VCB PROTAC 8QVU dep 2023-10-18, 4d after the 2023-10-14 horizon) => no training prior. Crystal structure. Strongest NR4A3-like blind test: novel target-E3 pairing + real pose uncertainty. Blind inputs: KRAS-G12D-GDP apo + VCB(VHL/EloB/EloC) apo, both abundant.

controls.title: Cryo-EM structure of CDK2 in complex with CRBN/DDB1 and B11
proteins: Oplophorus-luciferin 2-monooxygenase catalytic subunit,Cyclin-dependent kinase 2,GFP-like fluorescent chromoprotein
controls.notes: CDK2-CRBN/DDB1 PROTAC (compound B11). CDK2-CRBN degrader structures all post-horizon (9D0W 2024-08 earliest) => no training prior. CRBN was the Step-2 weak arm (6BOY failed 0.06) so a no-prior CRBN blind control is high-value. POI entity is a NanoBiT/GFP reporter FUSION of CDK2 for cryo-EM: use the CDK2 kinase domain (abundant apo) for blind prep, note the fusion tags.

controls.title: Ternary PROTAC-mediated complex of BRD4-BD1/CRBN/DDB1 and JQ1-AcQ bifunctional degrader
controls.notes: BRD4-BD1/CRBN/DDB1 + JQ1-AcQ bifunctional PROTAC. Target-E3 pair BRD4+CRBN HAS a training prior (6BOY dBET6, 6BN7 in the protac22 benchmark) => NOT a novel-pair test; included to check operational blind-prep on a well-behaved, clean-input case. Blind inputs: BRD4-BD1+JQ1 binary + CRBN/DDB1 apo, both abundant.

alternates.note: PROTAC-induced IRE1 ternary; kinase/RNase, novel fold; backup VHL no-prior control.
BCL6-CRBN-DDB1 LDD (BMS-986458); backup CRBN no-prior control.
SMARCA2-VCB PROTAC P4; overlaps the ternary-coop Layer-1 calibration panel (dual-use); backup.

leakage_recheck_required_at_reveal: Per risk #5: before trusting any control, re-check the sealed native for homologues, VHL/target-pair priors, and celastrol/scaffold analogues (exclusion-set membership is necessary, not sufficient).
